title: Exchange Student Guardianship Amendments
description: This bill amends the definition of an eligible student to allow foreign exchange students to participate in the Statewide Online Education Program (SOEP).

title: Public Lands Funding Amendments
description: This bill modifies provisions related to public lands funding.

title: School District Amendments
description: This bill repeals and amends certain provisions relating to creating a new school district and electing school board members when a new school district is created.

title: Energy Security Adjustments
description: This bill amends provisions related to the decommissioning or disposal of project entity assets and the associated permitting process.

title: Sunset and Repeal Date Code Corrections
description: This bill non-substantively amends codified sunset and repeal date provisions to conform to a standardized format.

title: Concurrent Resolution-directives to Government Officers Under the Utah Constitutional Sovereignty Act in Regard to Title IX
description: This concurrent resolution directs government officers to comply with Utah laws where there is a conflict with the new regulations adopted under Title IX of the Education Amendments of 1972, effective August 1, 2024.

title: Joint Resolution-legislative Findings on State Sovereignty in Regard to Title IX
description: This joint resolution declares that Utah has the sovereign authority and responsibility to safeguard the state's health, safety, and welfare of, and to promote the prosperity of, Utah residents and that the federal government's overreach in regard to the new regulations adopted under Title IX of the Education Amendments of 1972, effective August 1, 2024, infringes upon this authority and responsibility.
